title: Women to get free rides on Kochi Ro-Ro ferries soon, corporation passes resolution
summary: Kochi Corporation has unanimously passed a resolution offering free passage to female passengers on its Ro-Ro ferry services, excluding motorists, aiming to ease their financial burden.

title: Kerala reiterates demand for new Mullaperiyar Dam, Tamil Nadu opposes
summary: Kerala demanded a new Mullaperiyar dam citing safety fears, but Tamil Nadu insisted on raising the existing dam's water level, with a parliamentary committee forwarding both views to the Centre.

title: Nine-year-old Kozhikode girl dies; doctors suspect rare Kawasaki disease, officials rule out viral infection
summary: A nine-year-old girl has died from suspected Kawasaki disease, a rare inflammatory illness. Officials confirmed the diagnosis is unconfirmed and stressed the condition is not contagious, urging the public not to panic.

title: ₹18-cr hybrid ganja haul in Kochi: Cops arrest key syndicate member, seize four cars
summary: Police arrested Aneesh, a key logistics handler for an international hybrid ganja syndicate, as part of 'Operation Toofan' involving an ₹18-crore drug haul and several other arrests.

title: CMRL pay-off case: ED questions joint MD Saran S Kartha again
summary: The Enforcement Directorate questioned CMRL's joint managing director as part of a money laundering probe into alleged pay-offs to an IT firm. CMRL reportedly paid fictitious consultancy fees.

title: Privatising Kerala's mineral wealth. CM Satheesan turns tables on CPM
summary: The Chief Minister countered opposition accusations of privatisation by revealing their prior deal with Midwest Limited for mineral processing, stating the agreement was now off and private players would not be involved.

title: TVM Cricket coach gets another 28-year jail term in fourth rape case
summary: A cricket coach received 28 years' imprisonment for the sexual abuse of a minor, adding to his 127-year total sentence, though he will serve 42 years.
